acceptance_criteria: Hero CTA "Book session" is keyboard-reachable in <2 Tab presses from page load.
On <640px viewports, portrait stacks above bio text.
All design tokens trace back to the intake IR; no invented values.
Reduced-motion users see no animation on hover.

business_requirements.title: Artist hero bio widget
business_requirements.description: Above-the-fold hero block for the artist profile page — portrait photo, name, tagline, primary CTA ("Book session"), secondary CTA ("View portfolio").
